articles.title: Leak reveals new Xbox Game Pass “Starter Edition” that’s part of Discord Nitro - The Verge
articles.description: Microsoft is getting ready to bundle Xbox Game Pass with Discord Nitro. A more limited “Starter Edition” is on the way.

articles.title: Diablo 4: Lord of Hatred will release earlier than expected in the US, and teams up with Overwatch for some of the coolest skins I've ever seen - Windows Central
articles.description: The Diablo 4 developer chat just dropped a bunch of new info, Overwatch Skins, Twitch Drops, and a bucket of updates with Patch 3.0.0

articles.title: iOS 26.4.2: Apple Fixes iPhone Flaw Used By FBI To Read Deleted Messages - Forbes
articles.description: Apple has released a new iPhone update — that has taken many by surprise — to address a vulnerability that was recently exploited by the FBI.
